docs.name: Nested Comments
docs.description: Threaded comment section with infinite nesting, animated expand/collapse, inline reply composer, and spring-physics like button.

props.name: comments
props.description: Array of top-level comment objects, each optionally containing a `replies` array for nested threading.

props.name: maxDepth
props.description: Maximum nesting depth allowed before disabling the Reply button to prevent infinite threading.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the root wrapper element.

props.name: accentColor
props.description: Hex or CSS color used for reply badge highlights and interactive accent elements.

props.name: onReply
props.description: Callback fired when a user submits a reply, receiving the parent comment ID and reply text.

props.name: onLike
props.description: Callback fired when a user likes a comment, receiving the comment ID.

docs.overview: NestedComments renders a threaded discussion tree with animated reply forms, like/unlike interactions, and configurable nesting depth. Avatars are generated from initials when no image is provided.

scenarios.title: Blog post discussion
scenarios.description: Embed below a blog article to allow readers to reply, like, and thread conversations.

scenarios.title: Community Q&A thread
scenarios.description: Use maxDepth to cap nesting at 2 levels, keeping long threads readable.
